sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH active_manifest AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_processing_manifest_v2
  WHERE status = 'active'
    AND algorithm_version = 'ds-v1'
    AND fleet_name = :fleet_name
    AND pad_name = :pad_name
    AND (
      COALESCE(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT), '') IN ('', '__ALL__')
      OR name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)
    )
),
pressure AS (
  SELECT t.name, t.stage_num_td, t.segment_count
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_tuning_counts_v1 t
  JOIN active_manifest m
    ON m.name = t.name
   AND m.stage_num_td = t.stage_num_td
   AND m.source_signature = t.source_signature
  WHERE t.algorithm_version = 'tuning-v1'
    AND t.rolling_points = CAST(:rolling_points AS BIGINT)
    AND t.threshold_type = 'pressure'
    AND t.threshold_value = CAST(:pressure_threshold AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
),
rate AS (
  SELECT t.name, t.stage_num_td, t.segment_count
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_tuning_counts_v1 t
  JOIN active_manifest m
    ON m.name = t.name
   AND m.stage_num_td = t.stage_num_td
   AND m.source_signature = t.source_signature
  WHERE t.algorithm_version = 'tuning-v1'
    AND t.rolling_points = CAST(:rolling_points AS BIGINT)
    AND t.threshold_type = 'rate'
    AND t.threshold_value = CAST(:rate_threshold AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
),
baseline AS (
  SELECT
    s.name,
    s.stage_num_td,
    s.mid_stage_shutdown_lines
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_stage_summary_v2 s
  JOIN active_manifest m
    ON m.active_run_id = s.processing_run_id
   AND m.name = s.name
   AND m.stage_num_td = s.stage_num_td
),
stage_counts AS (
  SELECT
    m.name AS well_name,
    m.stage_num_td AS stage_num,
    COALESCE(p.segment_count, 0) AS pressure_surge_segments,
    COALESCE(r.segment_count, 0) AS pump_rate_drop_segments,
    COALESCE(b.mid_stage_shutdown_lines, 0) AS mid_stage_shutdown_segments,
    COALESCE(p.segment_count, 0) + COALESCE(r.segment_count, 0)
      AS triggered_segments
  FROM active_manifest m
  LEFT JOIN pressure p
    ON p.name = m.name AND p.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
  LEFT JOIN rate r
    ON r.name = m.name AND r.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
  LEFT JOIN baseline b
    ON b.name = m.name AND b.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
)

SELECT
  well_name,
  SUM(pressure_surge_segments) AS pressure_surge_segments,
  SUM(pump_rate_drop_segments) AS pump_rate_drop_segments,
  SUM(mid_stage_shutdown_segments) AS mid_stage_shutdown_segments,
  SUM(triggered_segments) AS triggered_segments
FROM stage_counts
GROUP BY well_name
ORDER BY triggered_segments DESC, well_name
) q
